package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerGarbageCollectionCleanupLargeSliceRetainedAfterTruncate() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_large_slice_retained_after_truncate"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag long-lived slices truncated to zero that still retain large backing arrays."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
